/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkesprotoboard.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesprotoboard.so CMakeFiles/fawkesprotoboard.dir/protobuf_thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesprotoboard.dir/blackboard_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesprotoboard.dir/protobuf_to_bb.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib:/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/interfaces /usr/lib64/libprotobuf.so -lprotobuf_comm -lboost_thread -lboost_system -L/usr/lib64 -lprotobuf -lcrypto /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesaspects.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/interfaces/libProtobufPeerInterface.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkespcl_utils.so -lpcl_common /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkestf.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesblackboard.so -lBulletSoftBody -lBulletDynamics -lBulletCollision -lLinearMath -lBulletSoftBody -lBulletDynamics -lBulletCollision -lLinearMath /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/interfaces/libTransformInterface.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeswebview.so -lmicrohttpd /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesplugin.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesconfig.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesnetcomm.so -lavahi-common -lavahi-client -lcrypto -lyaml-cpp -lsqlite3 -lelf /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkessyncpoint.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesinterface.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesutils.so -L/usr/lib64 /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so -llua-5.1 -lm -ldl -ltolua++ -lmagic -ldaemon -lpthread -lstdc++ -lm -lrt -ldl -luuid /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0
